MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AVA KHOSHRAVANI's Motion To Compel Further Responses Of Defendant Lyft's Inc. To Plaintiff's Request For Production, Set Two And Notice Of Deposition Topics For Person Most Knowledgable; Request For Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is continued to September 8, 2022 per the amended notice of motion filed by the moving party. Matter is transferred to the Discovery Calendar (room 301) to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on September 8, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
